WELCOME: Welcome to React Native Rapid Boilerplate
APP_INTRODUCTION: This app is a tech demo for Reach Native Rapid Boilerplate. This was built to provide you a faster, more efficient way to build your next app.
GET_RECOMMENDATIONS_SUBTITLE: See traders insight, get latest news from our hand picked professionals on the market. Get some confidence and start trading.
SWAP_DETAILS: You have swapped {{amount}} USDT for BTC!
ABOUT_INTRO: A production-ready React Native boilerplate designed to accelerate your mobile app development with best practices and modern tools.
CONTACT_ME_DESC: Feel free to reach out if you need assistance with this boilerplate or have any questions about implementation.
SHOW_ANNOTATIONS_DESC: Mark vocabulary, chunks and grammar in reading text
READING_SERIF_DESC: Use the Newsreader serif on the reading surface
DS_TAP_TO_ABSORB: Tap an Item to absorb it (teal → amber)
PLACEHOLDER_LEARN: This is where you keep your learning in flow.
PLACEHOLDER_CREATE: Turn articles, videos and podcasts you love into Lessons.
PLACEHOLDER_CHALLENGE: Swipe short Challenges and learn like it's entertainment.
PLACEHOLDER_PROFILE: Your North Star, Levels, Streak and Collection.
PLACEHOLDER_LESSON_PLAYER: The Bilingual Passage and Listening Replay will live here.
ONBOARDING_WELCOME_TITLE: Learn English through the content you love
ONBOARDING_WELCOME_SUBTITLE: Turn your favorite articles · videos · podcasts → Lessons
LP_TRANSLATE_HINT: Tap the VI badge at the start of a sentence → its meaning appears inline
LP_QUIZ_SUBTITLE: Understand it → finishing the quiz completes the Lesson
LP_QUIZ_WRONG: Not quite — the correct answer is in teal. No worries, you'll meet it again 💪
LP_QUIZ_DONE_BODY: You understood it & finished the quiz — Lesson complete! Anything you missed will re-surface in a new Lesson.
